source_pr.title: util/types: fix order by binary
source_pr.body: In Orderby Clause, as using BINARY operator to cast the following operand to a binary string, here meet an error. Improved IsOrderedType() to handle it.

symptoms: mustExecMatch(c, se, "select * from t order by 1", [][]interface{}{{1, 2, []byte("abc")}, {2, 1, []byte("bcd")}}) (session_test.go)
failure_signature: mustExecMatch(c, se, "select * from t order by 1", [][]interface{}{{1, 2, []byte("abc")}, {2, 1, []byte("bcd")}}) (session_test.go)

The current evidence does not include a concrete flaky signature or a targeted stabilization change, so we conservatively mark it as insufficient_evidence.
fix_pattern: N/A (insufficient evidence; no targeted stabilization change identified).
